summary: Continued the active DinoBrain OS completion goal. Reconfirmed verify:goal still has only the fresh real Codex Desktop pre-response hook proof blocker, improved start-codex-live-proof.ps1 so clipboard failures now expose clipboard_error, prompt_path, and prompt_text, bumped the app to v2.2.4, pushed the app commit and tag, and rebuilt the Windows installer ZIP/SHA. The final goal remains partial because policy prevents automating the Codex Desktop UI directly and no fresh codex_desktop hook event has been produced after the latest build.
decisions: Do not count background thread delegation or UI automation as live Codex Desktop proof.
Do not automate the Codex desktop UI with Computer Use because the skill explicitly forbids automating Codex desktop app UI.
Persist proof prompt text and prompt file path when clipboard access fails so the user can complete the fresh proof step without reconstructing the prompt.
Use v2.2.4 for this live-proof workflow improvement because v2.2.3 is already tagged and pushed.
next_steps: Open a fresh Codex Desktop workspace thread and paste the prompt from <machine-local-path>
After the fresh thread responds, rerun npm run verify:goal; the only expected blocker is pre_response_os_for_real_codex_desktop_hook until that event exists.
If GitHub Release asset upload is required, configure GITHUB_TOKEN or GH_TOKEN and rerun scripts/publish-github-release.ps1 without -SkipUpload.
